summary: Iteration 118: Coming Soon Interactive System Testing. All backend API tests passed (12/12). Frontend UI verified: ComingSoonSection renders on Dashboard with card title, countdown, hype bar, news events, auto comments, audience expectations, and Supporta/Boicotta buttons. Support interaction successfully increased hype.

issues: Console warnings about missing DialogTitle for accessibility - minor accessibility issue (same as previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: Coming Soon interact endpoint correctly validates action type (support/boycott)
Daily limit of 3 actions per player per day is enforced
CinePass cost of 1 per interaction is correctly deducted
Cannot interact with own content - returns 400 error
Max boycott penalty capped at 10 - prevents excessive damage
News events and auto comments are generated on each interaction
Diminishing returns implemented for repeated interactions on same content
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing for fresh daily limits
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coming Soon Interactive System fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/coming-soon/{id}/interact (action: support/boycott), GET /api/coming-soon/{id}/details, GET /api/coming-soon. Constants: COMING_SOON_DAILY_LIMIT=3, COMING_SOON_INTERACT_COST=1 CinePass. Test content ID: a30221a2-442d-4349-8c01-aa4a37cafc54 (Coming Soon Anime Test owned by TestStudio99). Frontend: ComingSoonSection.jsx renders cards with expandable details showing hype bar, anteprima, notizie, commenti, audience expectations, and Supporta/Boicotta buttons.

backend: GET /api/coming-soon - returns items with enriched data (id, title, content_type, production_house, hype_score)
GET /api/coming-soon/{id}/details - returns full details including news_events, auto_comments, support/boycott counts, audience_expectation
POST /api/coming-soon/{id}/interact - cannot interact with own content (returns 400)
POST /api/coming-soon/{id}/interact action=support - returns success with hype effects
POST /api/coming-soon/{id}/interact action=boycott - returns success with effects
Daily limit: 3 actions per player per day enforced
CinePass cost: 1 CinePass deducted per interaction
Max boycott penalty: total_boycott_penalty capped at 10
frontend: ComingSoonSection renders on Dashboard with data-testid='coming-soon-section'
Coming Soon card shows title, countdown timer, hype score
Clicking card expands it showing hype bar
Support interaction triggers API call and updates UI
Daily limit message shown when limit reached

features_verified.support_action: VERIFIED - POST /api/coming-soon/{id}/interact with action='support' returns success with hype effects
features_verified.boycott_action: VERIFIED - POST /api/coming-soon/{id}/interact with action='boycott' returns success with effects
features_verified.details_endpoint: VERIFIED - GET /api/coming-soon/{id}/details returns full details including news_events, auto_comments, support/boycott counts, audience_expectation
features_verified.daily_limit: VERIFIED - 3 actions per player per day, 4th action returns 400 error
features_verified.own_content_restriction: VERIFIED - cannot interact with own content (returns 400)
features_verified.enriched_list: VERIFIED - GET /api/coming-soon returns enriched items with news_events and auto_comments
features_verified.frontend_card_render: VERIFIED - ComingSoonSection renders on Dashboard with card title, countdown, hype
features_verified.frontend_expand: VERIFIED - Clicking a card expands it showing hype bar, anteprima, notizie, commenti, Supporta/Boicotta buttons
features_verified.frontend_support_button: VERIFIED - Clicking Supporta button triggers interaction and updates UI
